metadata.description: Reusable Claude Code Skills for session management, plan execution, and multi-session orchestration via the cw CLI.

plugins.name: session-management
plugins.description: Structured session handoffs, session-done wrap-ups, and debug triage with issue tracking and escalation.

plugins.name: plan-execution
plugins.description: Phase-by-phase plan execution with parallel sub-agents, working from markdown plans with checkbox tasks.

plugins.name: cw-orchestration
plugins.description: Queue plans and tech debt into the cw task queue, then claim, execute, and review them across sessions.
